series_metadata.series_title: Dam Safety Permitting and Construction Files
series_metadata.series_description: Records include permit applications, construction plans, construction inspection reports, technical data reports and studies, plans and specifications , permits and similar documents used to ensure construction of dams in accord with appropriate standards. These records are not available elsewhere.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Permanent unless converted to electronic records ; Electronic: Permanent, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent
